subject: feat(layout): add global cell indicator ring to Structure grid
body:
Show which cell is globally selected (from ContextBar) in the Structure
grid via a violet inset ring. This helps users see which cell they're
working on for alignment without conflicting with the independent
structure editing selection (section/cell for sizing and splitting).

Tags: layout, ui, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: structure-tab-ux
Semver: patch
